visual.name: proroadmap
visual.description: Strategic product roadmap visual for Power BI with quarter-first timelines, swimlanes, milestones, OKR binding, and status color rules.

en-US.visual.name: ProRoadmap
en-US.visual.description: Strategic product roadmap visual for Power BI with swimlanes, milestones, OKR binding, and status color rules.

dataRoles.name: itemName
dataRoles.description: The name of the roadmap item (Epic, Feature, Initiative)

dataRoles.name: itemId
dataRoles.description: Unique identifier - enables cross-filter selection IDs and hierarchy

dataRoles.name: parentId
dataRoles.description: Parent item ID - enables 2-level Theme > Epic/Feature hierarchy

dataRoles.name: teamArea
dataRoles.description: Swimlane grouping field (Team, Product Area, OKR category)

dataRoles.name: goal
dataRoles.description: Strategic goal or OKR this item supports

dataRoles.name: status
dataRoles.description: Status value for color rules (e.g. On Track, At Risk, Behind, Done)

dataRoles.name: itemType
dataRoles.description: Type tag: milestone, release, theme, epic, feature

dataRoles.name: colorField
dataRoles.description: Field value used for Color-by-Field rules

dataRoles.name: tooltipFields
dataRoles.description: Additional fields shown in hover tooltip
